question: Will X.com be accessible in the UK on 30th June?
resolution_criteria:
After the Grok sexual deepfakes scandal took off, the UK government has suggested the site formerly known as Twitter could be blocked under the Online Safety Act. 

This question asks whether an average UK user, without a VPN or other geoblock-avoidance tool, will be able to log in to X.com and post a tweet at any time on 30th June 2026.
